title: Spaghetti Carbonara
summary: A classic Italian pasta dish with eggs, cheese, bacon, and black pepper.
instructions: 1. Boil pasta. 2. Cook bacon. 3. Mix eggs and cheese. 4. Combine all ingredients.

title: Chicken Tikka Masala
summary: Chunks of grilled chicken (tikka) cooked in a smooth buttery & creamy tomato based gravy.
instructions: 1. Marinate chicken. 2. Grill chicken. 3. Prepare masala sauce. 4. Combine chicken with sauce.

title: Veggie Salad
summary: Fresh and healthy salad with seasonal vegetables.
instructions: 1. Chop vegetables. 2. Mix dressing. 3. Toss vegetables with dressing. 4. Serve fresh.
